items.name_en: Dynamic Chip Version M11945 Exclusive Real Shot! This Boulogne handbag reinterprets the classic design with Monogram Empreinte leather, showcasing a unique style with multiple carrying options. The interior slip pocket easily holds a smartphone, while the woven chain features eye-catching metal hardware. Dimensions: 29×16×9.5cm

items.name_en: ELLIPSD Series M46196 Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
ELLIPSD Series M46196 Uninspected Version#
▪Size: 28*21*8cm▪
Ellipse series, a 'clam bag' with unique design elements.
Featuring classic vintage print combined with unique lines for a striking look.
Open at the back, prioritizing practicality with capacity suitable for daily outings!
Versatile carrying methods: hand, crossbody, or shoulder!
Gets better the more you look at it, eye-catching for daily wear with a full retro vibe!

items.name_en: Exclusive Background Dynamic Chip Top-tier Original M13105 This CarryAll Dark Medium bag is crafted from soft lambskin to create a chic, relaxed silhouette, adding a striking touch to 2025 Kazuki Takamatsu 33 Colors Spring/Summer runway looks. Polished metal hardware contrasts with the good tactile micro-crepe texture. Ample space accommodates various daily items, making it a perfect travel companion.
